name: Classic Mahjong
author: Poki
description: Classic Mahjong is the ultimate version of the all-time classic mahjong game. With its full landscape mode, pleasing animations and beautiful tile art, it is hard not to get hooked into this game and finish all the levels in one go. Pay attention to the timer and don't waste time trying to flip two tiles that look alike. Can you be the very best at Classic Mahjong? How to play: Select / Flip - Left Mouse Button About the creator: Classic Mahjong was created by CoolGames B.V.
